text.title: Google Display Network Strategy Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real google-display-ads engagements. Each pairs a symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: 60% of impressions on parked / game / kids-app placements; CTR <0.1%.
antipattern.fix: Apply standard exclusion list before launch; review weekly.

antipattern.symptom: Only in-market audience targeted; CPA 3x acceptable; reach low.
antipattern.fix: Stack 3+ audience tiers; let bid strategy weight them.

antipattern.symptom: Single user sees ad 40 times/day; complaints rise; brand health falls.
